footer.text: — international platform for experience exchange, expert dialogue and partnership development in the field of Islamic finance and business.

hero.subtitle: International platform for dialogue, partnerships and exchange of practices in Islamic finance and business.

about.title: About the Forum
about.body1: Islamic Finance and Business Forum 2026 is an international forum bringing together experts, business representatives, financial institutions, regulators, investors and the professional community to discuss current issues in Islamic finance and business.
about.body2: The Forum creates a space for substantive dialogue, sharing practical experience, establishing new partnerships and discussing key challenges and opportunities in the industry.

items.title: Financial Institutions
items.description: Banks, Islamic financial organizations, investment and consulting structures.

items.title: Business
items.description: Companies and entrepreneurs interested in partnerships, growth and new instruments.

items.title: Regulators and Development Institutions
items.description: Representatives of government, quasi-government and industry structures.

items.title: Experts and Academic Communities
items.description: Researchers, educators, analysts and specialists in relevant fields.

items.title: Investors
items.description: Representatives of the investment community and structures working in adjacent areas.

items.title: Professional Communities
items.description: All those working at the intersection of finance, business, Islamic economics and sustainable development.

items.title: Relevant Expertise
items.description: A practical perspective on trends, challenges and opportunities in Islamic finance and business.

items.title: Strong Speakers
items.description: Access to insights from industry leaders, regulators, international experts and practitioners.

items.title: New Partnerships
items.description: The opportunity to establish business connections and discuss joint initiatives.

items.title: Regional and International Dialogue
items.description: Discussion of issues relevant to Kazakhstan, Central Asia and the international market.

items.title: Practical Value
items.description: Cases, solutions and ideas that can be applied in professional practice.

items.title: Visibility for Business and Institutions
items.description: A platform for positioning, partnership and professional presence in the industry.

items.name: TIDAM
items.description: — a leading communications agency with 20+ years of experience across the CIS, counting among its loyal clients organisations such as the UN, the World Bank, leading Central Asian banks, Huawei Technologies, Mars, and others.

items.name: AIFB Association
items.description: — a non-profit organisation whose mission is to advance the principles of Islamic business and finance, uniting professionals, entrepreneurs, academics and other industry participants.

items.name: AIFC
items.description: — an ecosystem for transparent and profitable business under international standards, attracting investment and developing the country's financial market through the introduction of new products and services.

programs.title: Forum Program
programs.subtitle: The program of Islamic Finance and Business Forum 2026 includes plenary sessions, thematic panels, expert presentations, practical discussions and professional networking opportunities.
programs.firesideChatText: Current state of the Islamic finance and business market.
programs.panelSessionText: Regulatory dialogues and future development steps.
programs.showcaseText1: Practical experience in the Islamic financial market: implemented cases.
programs.showcaseText2: Investment solutions and tools in Islamic finance.
programs.presentationText: Strategies for promoting Central Asia as a unified investment direction.

section1.title: 1. General Provisions
section1.content: This User Agreement (hereinafter referred to as the 'Agreement') governs the relationship between the organizers of the Islamic Finance and Business Forum 2026 (hereinafter referred to as the 'Organizer' or 'Site Administration') and the individual using the website and registration system (hereinafter referred to as the 'User'). By using the website and completing the forum participant registration procedure, the User confirms that they have read, understood, and accept all terms of this Agreement in full. If the User does not agree with the terms of the Agreement, they must cease using the website.

section2.title: 2. Terms of Use
section2.content: The website is intended solely for participant registration and providing information about the forum. The User agrees to use the website in good faith and not to take any actions that could disrupt the normal operation of the resource or infringe upon the rights of third parties. Posting knowingly false information, attempting unauthorized access to other participants' data, or using automated scripts to interact with the website without explicit permission from the Administration is prohibited. The Administration reserves the right to restrict or terminate the User's access to the website in case of violation of this Agreement without prior notice.

section3.title: 3. Registration and Account
section3.content: To participate in the forum, the User must register by providing accurate personal data: first name, last name, phone number, email address, position, organization, country, city, and preferred language of communication. The User is responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their account credentials (login and password) and for all actions taken under their account. In case of loss or compromise of the password, the User must immediately notify the Administration. Each User may have only one account; creating duplicate accounts is not allowed. Upon successful registration, the participant is assigned a unique QR code for identification at the event.

section4.title: 4. Liability of the Parties
section4.content: The Administration makes all reasonable efforts to ensure the uninterrupted operation of the website, but does not guarantee its absolute availability and is not liable for temporary technical failures caused by circumstances beyond its control. The Administration is not responsible for the content of information provided by the User during registration. The User is solely responsible for the accuracy of the data entered. The aggregate liability of the Administration for any disputes related to the use of the website is limited to the extent established by applicable law.

section5.title: 5. Changes to Terms
section5.content: The Administration reserves the right to unilaterally amend this Agreement. The current version is always available on this page. Continued use of the website after the publication of changes constitutes the User's unconditional acceptance of the new terms. If the User does not agree with the changes made, they may delete their account at any time by sending a corresponding request to the Administration. This Agreement is governed by the applicable laws of the country where the forum is held. All disputes shall be resolved through negotiations, and if no agreement is reached, in the competent court at the Organizer's location.

dataItems.item7: Country and city of residence / work

section1.title: 1. General Provisions
section1.content: This Privacy Policy (hereinafter referred to as the 'Policy') describes what personal data is collected by the Organizer of the Islamic Finance and Business Forum 2026 (hereinafter referred to as the 'Organizer'), for what purposes it is used, and how it is protected. The Policy applies to all users who have registered or are registering on the forum website. By registering on the website, the User gives explicit consent to the processing of their personal data under the terms described in this Policy.

section2.title: 2. What Data We Collect
section2.intro: During the forum participant registration process, the Organizer collects the following categories of personal data:
section2.passwordNote: The password is stored exclusively as a hash (irreversible cryptographic transformation) and cannot be recovered by the Organizer in plain text.

section3.title: 3. Purposes of Data Processing
section3.content: The collected personal data is used exclusively for the following purposes: identification and accreditation of the participant at the forum; generation and issuance of an electronic badge with a personal QR code, allowing quick verification of the participant at the entrance and at forum venues; informing about the program, schedule changes, and organizational matters; preparation of anonymized event statistics; compliance with applicable legal requirements. Transfer of data to third parties for commercial purposes without the User's consent is not carried out.

section4.title: 4. Data Storage and Protection
section4.content: Personal data is stored on secure servers using modern technical and organizational security measures: connection encryption (HTTPS/TLS), password hashing, access control to databases. Data is stored for the period necessary for the purposes of registration and holding the forum, as well as for the period provided by applicable legislation on archiving and reporting. After the expiration of the specified period, the data is deleted or anonymized.

section5.title: 5. Data Subject Rights
section5.content: The User has the right at any time to: request access to their personal data and obtain a copy; demand correction of inaccurate or outdated information; withdraw consent to data processing and demand its deletion (subject to restrictions established by law); file a complaint with the authorized body for personal data protection in their country of residence. To exercise the listed rights, the User sends a request to the contact details specified in section 6 of this Policy. The Organizer considers requests within a reasonable time, but no later than 30 calendar days from the date of receipt of the request.

section6.title: 6. Contacts
section6.content: For all questions related to the processing of personal data, as well as to exercise their rights as a data subject, the User may contact the Organizer via the email address indicated in the 'Contacts' section on the main page of the website, or through the official communication channels of the forum. The request must include the first name, last name, email address used during registration, and the essence of the request. The Organizer undertakes to maintain the confidentiality of such requests.
